name_en: Premium Factory Leather M25497 This Capucines mini bag shines in the 2025 Early Autumn collection with the Bloomcut pattern. Laser-cut calfskin features delicate cutouts, subtly referencing the brand's classic Monogram flower. LV lettering and top handle add rich details; suitable for crossbody, shoulder, or hand carry. Dimensions: 21 × 14 × 8 cm
